Eusexuality is an alternative model of a good [[Sexuality|sex life]] with the abolition of [[romance]].

Eusexuality replaces [[marriage]] with [[syzygy]].

While it literally means good sexuality, it is also a pun off of eusociality, in reference to the view of sexuality as being between three parties (the two people and [[The Pride]], sometimes four with the inclusion of [[Alo]]).

== See Also ==

* [[a new theory of sex]]
* [[Antisociality and Prosociality]]
* [[Xenia]]

[[Category:Sexuality]]
[[sn:Eusexuality]][[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Alienation]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
